content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms from autonomous ICM-enabled agents can be re-purposed to prioritize which new unlabeled data samples get stored in 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory, creating a self-sustaining active learning cycle that reduces redundant memory usage while improving long-task generalization. This framework lets the agent itself grow its own training dataset and memory store without external human labeling prompts.
